task_completion.description: Verify that the diagram title is correctly set.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'E-Commerce Customer Journey Map' should be clearly visible as a title on the Wondershare EdrawMax canvas.

task_completion.description: Verify that the six required phases are arranged as columns.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for six distinct columns or horizontal stages labeled exactly: 'Awareness', 'Consideration', 'Purchase', 'Delivery', 'Usage', and 'Support'.

task_completion.description: Verify that each phase includes the four required sections.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for rows, sub-headers, or distinct areas within the phases labeled 'Customer Action', 'Touchpoint', 'Emotion', and 'Pain Point'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the specific touchpoints and actions are populated in the diagram.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for specific text entries matching the prompt, such as 'Instagram' or 'Facebook' in Awareness, 'Checkout' in Purchase, 'Tracking' or 'Tracks order' in Delivery, and 'Live Chat' in Support.

task_completion.description: Verify that the emotions are correctly color-coded according to the instructions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for background colors, text colors, or icons in the Emotion section: Green for Consideration and Usage (Positive); Yellow or Orange for Awareness and Delivery (Neutral); Red for Purchase and Support (Negative).

task_completion.description: Verify that the diagram is saved as an EDDX file and exported as a PNG file in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a save/export dialog, the EdrawMax title bar, or a file manager window showing 'customer_journey_map.eddx' and 'customer_journey_map.png' being saved to the '/home/ga/Diagrams/' directory.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the Wondershare EdrawMax GUI to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the EdrawMax application interface with toolbars, menus, and the canvas being actively edited, rather than terminal commands generating the file directly.

integrity.description: Verify that the diagram elements were individually placed or typed.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of shapes, text boxes, or templates being manipulated on the canvas, rather than a single pre-made image being pasted into the application.

integrity.description: Verify that the PNG export was performed through the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the EdrawMax 'Export' or 'Save As' dialog boxes being used to create the .png file, rather than a command-line conversion tool.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output files are strictly '/home/ga/Diagrams/customer_journey_map.eddx' and '/home/ga/Diagrams/customer_journey_map.png'. The diagram must contain the exact text strings: 'Awareness', 'Consideration', 'Purchase', 'Delivery', 'Usage', 'Support', 'Instagram', 'Checkout', 'Tracking', and 'Live Chat'. Emotions must be color-coded: Green (positive), Yellow/Orange (neutral), and Red (negative).
